text:
cors{
	allowOriginFunc:            config.AllowOriginFunc,
	allowOriginWithContextFunc: config.AllowOriginWithContextFunc,
	allowAllOrigins:            config.AllowAllOrigins,
	allowCredentials:           config.AllowCredentials,
	allowOrigins:               normalize(config.AllowOrigins),
	normalHeaders:              generateNormalHeaders(config),
	preflightHeaders:           generatePreflightHeaders(config),
	wildcardOrigins:            config.parseWildcardRules(),
	optionsResponseStatusCode:  config.OptionsResponseStatusCode,
}

type cors struct {
	allowAllOrigins            bool
	allowCredentials           bool
	allowOriginFunc            func(string) bool
	allowOriginWithContextFunc func(*gin.Context, string) bool
	allowOrigins               []string
	normalHeaders              http.Header
	preflightHeaders           http.Header
	wildcardOrigins            [][]string
	optionsResponseStatusCode  int
}

type Diagnostic struct {
	Code      string `json:"code"`
	Message   string `json:"message"`
	File      string `json:"file,omitempty"`
	Line      int    `json:"line,omitempty"`
	Column    int    `json:"column,omitempty"`
	Interface string `json:"interface,omitempty"`
	Method    string `json:"method,omitempty"`
	Snippet   string `json:"snippet,omitempty"`
	Hint      string `json:"hint,omitempty"`
}

type Relationship struct {
	Name                     string
	Type                     RelationshipType
	Field                    *Field
	Polymorphic              *Polymorphic
	References               []*Reference
	Schema                   *Schema
	FieldSchema              *Schema
	JoinTable                *Schema
	foreignKeys, primaryKeys []string
}

type ApplicationResponse struct {
	typesapplication.TypeToEmbed

	Application      typesapplication.Application   `json:"application"`
	Application2     typesapplication.Application2  `json:"application2"`
	ApplicationArray []typesapplication.Application `json:"application_array"`
	ApplicationTime  typesapplication.DateOnly      `json:"application_time"`
	ShouldSkip       typesapplication.ShouldSkip    `json:"should_skip"`
}

type API struct {
	Filename      string
	Syntax        *ast.SyntaxStmt
	info          *ast.InfoStmt    // Info block does not participate in code generation.
	importStmt    []ast.ImportStmt // ImportStmt block does not participate in code generation.
	TypeStmt      []ast.TypeStmt
	ServiceStmts  []*ast.ServiceStmt
	importManager *importstack.ImportStack
	importSet     map[string]lang.PlaceholderType
}
